$schema_note: v4 hats.json — per-hat downshift_threshold tuning per DD-08. verifier raised 0.20→0.30 (residual battery is smaller; raise threshold to block accidental small-tier picks). formatter retains downshiftable: false (was already non-downshiftable in v3.1.0; DD-08 reaffirms). All other hats unchanged at 0.20.

gate.rationale: Input validation and classification; medium reasoning needed for EC detection.

extractor.rationale: Structured field extraction from text; no large-context synthesis required.

analyzer.rationale: Single-axis analysis; medium reasoning sufficient per branch.

aggregator.rationale: Cross-branch synthesis with contradiction resolution requires full context handling.

generator.rationale: Producing complete skill artifacts (registry tables, edge tables, module files) benefits from larger context. Threshold raised 0.20→0.30 to match verifier hat (DD-08 precedent) — generator output quality is as critical as verifier accuracy for consumer-facing artifacts.

formatter.rationale: v4: hat default tier raised to model-medium because formatter now hosts N-SPEC-ARTIFACT (5-input synthesis, upshifted per DD-07). Per-node tier overrides still apply (N-JSON stays model-small). Non-downshiftable to prevent large→small drift.

verifier.rationale: v4: hat default tier dropped to model-medium per DD-07 (residual V-battery is ~40% smaller than v3.1.0's full battery). Threshold raised 0.20→0.30 per DD-08 to block accidental small-tier picks on the smaller residual battery.

persister.rationale: File write operations; mechanical, no LLM reasoning needed.
